creator: bu7cher@yandex.ru
text:
Hi, Peter.

Can you give a bit more information?
1. Did you try to change ATA/AHCI/RAID-related options in your BIOS?
2. Is your controller detected by kernel or not?
3. Can you boot system from CD in verbose boot mode and save dmesg
to PATA disk or USB flash and show dmesg?
4. Or can you show similar information from linux?

-- 
WBR, Andrey V. Elsukov
